user.title: Temperature Comparison
user.description: Select the indoor and outdoor temperature sensors to compare year-over-year.

data_description.inside_temperature_entity: The sensor measuring your indoor temperature
data_description.outside_temperature_entity: The sensor measuring the outdoor temperature

error.same_entity: Inside and outside entities must be different
error.entity_not_found: One or more selected entities could not be found

abort.already_configured: This entity combination is already configured

data_description.history_days: Number of days to average for the comparison
data_description.weight_outdoor_correction: How much outdoor temperature change affects the corrected difference (0 = ignore, 1 = full weight)
data_description.update_interval: How often to recompute the statistics
